title_header: Sweet Home, Episode 2 (Carnby Kim, Youngchan Hwang)

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: WHAT THE...?

dialogue.speaker: SECURITY GUARD
dialogue.line: HEY! KID! I'M SORRY!! WOW, THAT COULD'VE BEEN A DISASTER!

dialogue.speaker: SECURITY GUARD
dialogue.line: THESE THINGS ARE REALLY POWERFUL, HUH?

dialogue.speaker: SECURITY GUARD
dialogue.line: I'M REALLY SORRY, KID.

dialogue.speaker: SECURITY GUARD
dialogue.line: ANYWAY, WE DON'T HAVE A LOT OF PEOPLE WHO WORK ON THE WEEKENDS, SO... EVERYONE HERE TREATS THE SECURITY GUARDS LIKE SHIT. OOPS.

dialogue.speaker: SECURITY GUARD
dialogue.line: BY THE WAY, I'VE NEVER SEEN YOU BEFORE. WHAT BROUGHT YOU TO THIS PLACE?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: WELL... I MOVED.

dialogue.speaker: SECURITY GUARD
dialogue.line: WHAT? CAN'T HEAR YOU, KID. SPEAK UP.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: MOVED.

dialogue.speaker: SECURITY GUARD
dialogue.line: OH! I HEARD SOMEONE WAS MOVING INTO NO. 1410 TODAY. DO YOU LIVE ALONE? SO I GUESS THAT'S YOU.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: I'M ALONE.

dialogue.speaker: SECURITY GUARD
dialogue.line: WHAT? I CAN'T HEAR YOU.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: I AM ALONE.

dialogue.speaker: SECURITY GUARD
dialogue.line: YOU LOOK KIND OF YOUNG TO BE MOVING OUT OF YOUR FAMILY'S PLACE, BUT EVERYONE HAS THEIR OWN CIRCUMSTANCES. WHEN'S ALL YOUR STUFF COMING?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: LATER, IN THE AFTERNOON.

dialogue.speaker: SECURITY GUARD
dialogue.line: I'LL LEAVE YOU TO IT! BUT COULD YOU STOP BY MY OFFICE THIS EVENING? SEE, THERE ARE A FEW THINGS YOU NEED TO KNOW ABOUT LIVING HERE.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: OK.

dialogue.speaker: SECURITY GUARD
dialogue.line: WHAT AN AWKWARD GUY.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: HUH?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: THIS PLACE IS THE MIDDLE OF NOWHERE. IT'S FUCKED.

dialogue.speaker: RELATIVE
dialogue.line: HOW TRAGIC. I KNOW, THE DAUGHTER WAS SO YOUNG AND THE FATHER WAS QUITE SUCCESSFUL. A BEAUTIFUL FAMILY AND SUCH LOVELY PEOPLE. EXCEPT FOR THEIR SON! WHERE THE HELL IS HE?! WHAT COULD POSSIBLY BE MORE IMPORTANT RIGHT NOW? I CALLED BUT HE'S NOT PICKING UP.

dialogue.speaker: RELATIVE
dialogue.line: WHAT ELSE WOULD HYUN BE DOING? THAT BASTARD! HIS PARENTS WORRIED ABOUT HIM ALL THEIR LIVES AND NOW...

dialogue.speaker: RELATIVE
dialogue.line: HYUN. YOU. YOU FINALLY SHOWED UP.

dialogue.speaker: RELATIVE
dialogue.line: HE'S WEARING SANDALS! THAT IS DISGRACEFUL! HEY! HYUN!

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: I REALLY DIDN'T FEEL LIKE COMING OUTSIDE. BUT IT WAS SO UNBELIEVABLE.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: THREE ACCOUNTS AND ONLY TWENTY THOUSAND DOLLARS. HOW CAN I LIVE OFF OF THIS?! ANSWER ME, YOU INCOMPETENT BASTARDS!! HOW AM I GOING TO TAKE CARE OF MYSELF WITH ONLY THIS?! GET THAT SON OF A BITCH OUT OF HERE!!!

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: YOU DUMBASS. FUCK.

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: LET'S SEE, IF I USE THIRTY DOLLARS A DAY... THIRTY TIMES THIRTY IS NINE HUNDRED. NINE HUNDRED TIMES TWELVE IS... 10,800 DOLLARS A YEAR. THEN THERE'S INTERNET, FOOD, GAS, WATER... SO HOW LONG...?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: GOD DAMN IT!!! WAIT... WHAT IF... YES! THAT'S IT! I CAN SELL THE HOUSE!! IT'S GONNA BE A PAIN IN THE NECK, BUT AFTER SELLING IT... I CAN MOVE SOMEWHERE CHEAP! A STUDIO! YES! IF I DO THAT... SOMEHOW I'LL... I'LL...

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: HMM... SHOULD I KILL MYSELF?

dialogue.speaker: HYUN
dialogue.line: SUICIDE.

summary: Hyun moves into apartment 1410, having a brief, awkward conversation with a security guard. Later, at his family's funeral, relatives criticize him for his appearance and absence. Hyun, now alone and financially struggling, contemplates his future and considers suicide.
